evals.prompt: I want to take a research paper on the impact of AI on higher education quality assurance all the way from research to submission - the complete workflow.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-research-pipeline as orchestrator: detects no materials so enters Stage 1 (RESEARCH), recommends per-stage modes, dispatches alterlab-deep-research / alterlab-paper-writer / alterlab-paper-reviewer in sequence, enforces mandatory Stage 2.5 and 4.5 integrity checks, and prompts user confirmation at each checkpoint.

evals.prompt: I already have a finished paper draft. Run it through the whole end-to-end paper workflow - integrity check, review, revision, everything.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-research-pipeline in mid-entry mode: detects an existing draft, enters at Stage 2.5 (INTEGRITY) which cannot be skipped, then proceeds through Stage 3 review, Stage 4 revision, Stage 3' re-review, Stage 4.5 final integrity, and Stage 5 finalize, with checkpoints between stages.

evals.prompt: I submitted to a journal and got a revise-and-resubmit with reviewer comments. Take me through the resubmission process end to end.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-research-pipeline External Review Protocol: parses unstructured journal reviewer comments into a structured External Review Summary, runs strategic revision coaching (accept/partially-accept/reject per Major comment, not default accept-all), produces a revised draft plus Response to Reviewers, then runs completeness self-verification and Stage 4.5 final integrity check.

evals.prompt: Where are we in the paper workflow right now - show me the pipeline status dashboard with which stages are done.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-research-pipeline state tracking: renders the Progress Dashboard listing all 10 stages with completion markers, integrity verification results (pre-review and final), and the review history (per-round decisions).

evals.prompt: Just do a literature review for me on virtual production in film education - I only need the sources and a synthesis, nothing else.
evals.expected_output: defers to alterlab-deep-research / does not invoke alterlab-research-pipeline (a single-function research request, the pipeline is unnecessary when only one stage is needed)

evals.prompt: Can you just peer review my manuscript and give me an editorial decision? I don't need any of the other steps.
evals.expected_output: defers to alterlab-paper-reviewer / does not invoke alterlab-research-pipeline (a single-function review request that should trigger the reviewer skill directly, not the orchestrator)

evals.prompt: My paper is final - just convert it to APA 7.0 formatting and give me a DOCX and LaTeX PDF.
evals.expected_output: defers to alterlab-paper-writer (format-convert mode) / does not invoke alterlab-research-pipeline (only formatting is requested, a single downstream function rather than the full workflow)
